code: import{createContext,useContext,useEffect,useMemo,useState}from'react';import TODOS from'../mock/todos';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const TodosContext=/*#__PURE__*/createContext(null);const TODOS_STORAGE_KEY='alara-react-todos';function getInitialTodos(){if(typeof window==='undefined'){return TODOS;}try{const storedTodos=window.localStorage.getItem(TODOS_STORAGE_KEY);return storedTodos?JSON.parse(storedTodos):TODOS;}catch{return TODOS;}}export function TodosProvider(_ref){let{children}=_ref;const[todos,setTodos]=useState(getInitialTodos);useEffect(()=>{if(typeof window==='undefined'){return;}window.localStorage.setItem(TODOS_STORAGE_KEY,JSON.stringify(todos));},[todos]);const createTodo=title=>{const newTodo={id:Date.now(),title:title.trim(),completed:false};setTodos(prevTodos=>[newTodo,...prevTodos]);return newTodo;};const updateTodo=(id,updates)=>{setTodos(prevTodos=>prevTodos.map(todo=>String(todo.id)===String(id)?{...todo,...updates}:todo));};const deleteTodo=id=>{setTodos(prevTodos=>prevTodos.filter(todo=>String(todo.id)!==String(id)));};const toggleTodo=id=>{setTodos(prevTodos=>prevTodos.map(todo=>String(todo.id)===String(id)?{...todo,completed:!todo.completed}:todo));};const getTodoById=id=>todos.find(todo=>String(todo.id)===String(id))||null;const value=useMemo(()=>({todos,createTodo,updateTodo,deleteTodo,toggleTodo,getTodoById}),[todos]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TodosContext.Provider,{value:value,children:children});}export function useTodosContext(){const context=useContext(TodosContext);if(!context){throw new Error('useTodosContext must be used within TodosProvider');}return context;}
